buildCommand: node -e "const fs=require('fs');let s=fs.readFileSync('prisma/schema.prisma','utf8');s=s.replace('provider = \"sqlite\"','provider = \"postgresql\"');fs.writeFileSync('prisma/schema.prisma',s)" && npx prisma generate && npx prisma db push --accept-data-loss && npx tsx prisma/seed.ts && next build
